Container.Name: Fail2ban-Studio
Container.Overview: A companion dashboard for Docker-based Fail2ban setups on Unraid. It writes a managed jail.d local file, exposes an elegant web UI, and can talk to the Fail2ban container through the Docker socket for live status and actions.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Web UI port for Fail2ban Studio.

Config.Name: Fail2ban Config
Config.Description: Use the same host folder that the Fail2ban container mounts to /config.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Optional but recommended. Required for live status, ban/unban, and reload buttons.

Config.Name: Fail2ban Container Name
Config.Description: Name of your existing Fail2ban container.
